items.title: Orama-Interactive/Pixelorama
items.description: Unleash your creativity with Pixelorama, a powerful and accessible open-source pixel art multitool. Whether you want to create sprites, tiles, animations, or just express yourself in the language of pixel art, this software will realize your pixel-perfect dreams with a vast toolbox of features. Available on Windows, Linux, macOS and the Web!
items.cn_summary: 开源像素艺术多工具，支持精灵、瓦片和动画创作。

items.title: mvanhorn/last30days-skill
items.description: AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary
items.cn_summary: AI智能体跨平台研究并综合摘要任意话题。

items.title: bytedance/deer-flow
items.description: An open-source long-horizon SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skill, subagents and message gateway, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.
items.cn_summary: 字节跳动开源长周期超级智能体框架

items.title: SellerClaw
items.description: A team of AI agents that runs your stores across channels
items.cn_summary: 多AI代理团队跨渠道管理店铺

items.title: Reroute, Don't Remove: Recoverable Visual Token Routing for Vision-Language Models
items.description: Vision-language models (VLMs) project images into hundreds to thousands of visual tokens, making decoder inference expensive in both attention computation and KV-cache memory. Existing visual-token reduction methods largely follow a rank-and-remove paradigm: they score visual tokens, keep a compact subset, and permanently discard the rest. We show that this irreversible action is fragile because visual-token importance changes across decoder depth; tokens ranked low at one stage may become relev
items.cn_summary: 通过可恢复视觉令牌路由减少VLM推理成本
